message:
fix: MarshalSettings no longer mutates input and can clear editorMode

MarshalSettings was modifying the input SettingsJSON.Extra map in-place.
Now copies Extra before modifying. Also, clearing EditorMode to empty
string now correctly removes the key from output rather than leaving
the old value from the initial unmarshal.

Fixes gt-6uiv5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
